note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right cervical wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Abscess abscess Right cervical measures 0.8 cm x 1.5 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 45% slough, 55% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Abscess abscess Right cervical — not improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Nutritional consult ordered.
